question: Which segment holds the largest share in the last year shown?

options.A: The orange area (Segment B) holds the largest share.
options.B: Cannot determine which segment holds the largest share without a legend to explain the color coding.
options.C: The red area (Segment A) holds the largest share.
options.D: The red area (Segment D) holds the largest share.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
